proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_078 (continuous, range 30-90, mean 65) is positively associated with pfs_months (Pearson r > 0).
feature_057 (3-level ordinal, values 0/1/2) is associated with pfs_months: higher levels predict shorter pfs_months (linear trend, slope < 0).
feature_051 (binary) is associated with shorter pfs_months when present (mean diff < 0 versus absent).

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=+0.766, slope=+0.1765 months per unit feature_078, p=0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_038 (binary) is associated with longer pfs_months when present (mean diff > 0 versus absent).
feature_013 (binary) is associated with shorter pfs_months when present (mean diff < 0).
feature_043 (binary) is associated with shorter pfs_months when present (mean diff < 0).
feature_109 (binary) is associated with shorter pfs_months when present (mean diff < 0).
feature_067 (binary) is associated with longer pfs_months when present (mean diff > 0).
feature_099 (continuous, range 0-24.6) is negatively correlated with pfs_months (r < 0).
feature_092 (continuous, mean 3.8, range 1.5-5.5) is positively correlated with pfs_months (r > 0).
feature_009 (continuous, range 0.02-777) is negatively correlated with pfs_months (r < 0).

analyses.result_summary: feature_099: Pearson r=-0.1229, slope=-0.0730 months/unit, p=2.21e-167.
feature_092: Pearson r=+0.1018, slope=+0.4654 months/unit, p=3.25e-115.
feature_009: Pearson r=-0.0377, slope=-0.0053 months/unit, p=3.13e-17.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across feature_064 race categories (white/hispanic/asian/black/other) (ANOVA p < 0.05).
Mean pfs_months differs across feature_018 insurance categories (medicare/private/uninsured/medicaid) (ANOVA p < 0.05).
feature_025 (5-level ordinal) shows a difference in mean pfs_months across levels (ANOVA p < 0.05).
Mean pfs_months increases monotonically across quartiles of feature_078 (Q4 - Q1 > 0).
feature_051's negative association with pfs_months persists after adjusting for feature_078 (continuous), with adjusted coefficient < 0.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted for feature_078: feature_051 coef=-1.348 months, p=0.00e+00. Model R^2=0.673.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_038's positive association with pfs_months persists after adjusting for feature_078, feature_057, and feature_051 (adjusted coef > 0).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted: feature_038 coef=+0.935 months, p=0.00e+00. Full coef table: {'Intercept': -5.623, 'feature_038': 0.9352, 'feature_078': 0.1758, 'feature_057': -1.1749, 'feature_051': -1.3539}. R^2=0.821.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of feature_038 (effect on pfs_months) varies across feature_057 levels (interaction p < 0.05); we expect the largest absolute benefit at the most-advanced level (feature_057=2).

analyses.code: F-test ols(pfs ~ f038 + C(f057) + f078) vs ols(pfs ~ f038*C(f057) + f078)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs in magnitude across feature_057 levels (interaction p < 0.05); we expect a more negative absolute effect at higher feature_057 levels.

analyses.code: F-test ols(pfs ~ f051 + C(f057) + f078) vs ols(pfs ~ f051*C(f057) + f078)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of feature_038 on pfs_months is attenuated in patients with feature_051=1 versus feature_051=0 (positive feature_038*feature_051 interaction term magnitude).

analyses.code: F-test for f038:f051 interaction adjusting for f078, C(f057)
analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=1.73 df=1, p=1.89e-01. f038 effect when f051=0: +0.941; when f051=1: +1.011.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs across feature_064 race categories (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test for f038:C(f064) interaction adjusted for f078,C(f057)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs across feature_018 insurance categories (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test for f038:C(f018) interaction adjusted for f078,C(f057)
analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=1.89 df=3, p=1.30e-01. f038 diff by insurance: medicare: +0.965 (n1=4265); private: +0.935 (n1=3992); uninsured: +0.933 (n1=382); medicaid: +1.112 (n1=1383). Range: 0.178.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between feature_099 and pfs_months is steeper (more negative slope) within higher feature_057 stage levels (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test for f099:C(f057) interaction adjusted for f078

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_038 benefit on pfs_months is larger in patients with higher feature_092 values (positive feature_038*feature_092 interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=11.68 df=1, p=6.32e-04. f038 effect on pfs_months: in high-f092 (>= median 3.80) +0.926; in low-f092 +1.033.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_038 benefit on pfs_months differs across feature_078 quartiles (interaction p < 0.05).
feature_007 (binary, ~50/50 split, plausibly sex) is associated with pfs_months (mean diff != 0).
The effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs by feature_007 (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test f038:f007 interaction adjusted for f078,C(f057)
analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=0.21 df=1, p=6.45e-01. f038 effect when f007=1: +0.989; when f007=0: +0.959.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_013 retains a negative association with pfs_months after adjusting for feature_078, feature_057, feature_051 (adjusted coef < 0).
feature_043 retains a negative association with pfs_months after adjusting for feature_078, feature_057, feature_051 (adjusted coef < 0).
feature_109 retains a negative association with pfs_months after adjusting for feature_078, feature_057, feature_051 (adjusted coef < 0).

analyses.result_summary: feature_013 adj coef=-0.353 months, p=2.85e-306. Model R^2=0.804.
feature_043 adj coef=-0.284 months, p=9.81e-195. Model R^2=0.804.
feature_109 adj coef=-0.356 months, p=1.30e-57. Model R^2=0.804.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_067's positive association with pfs_months persists after adjustment for feature_078, feature_057, and feature_051 (adjusted coef > 0).

analyses.result_summary: feature_067 adj coef=+0.178 months, p=6.42e-11. R^2=0.794.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction between feature_038 and feature_057 on pfs_months is itself modified by feature_051 (three-way interaction p < 0.05).
Combined model with feature_099 (negative) and feature_092 (positive) and feature_057 explains substantially more variance in pfs_months than feature_057 alone (Delta R^2 > 0.01).
There is a nonlinear (quadratic) component to the feature_078 - pfs_months relationship beyond the linear term (quadratic term coefficient p < 0.05).

analyses.code: ols('pfs ~ f078 + f078^2'); test quadratic term
analyses.result_summary: Quadratic term coef=+0.000589, p=6.99e-34. Linear-only R^2=0.5869; quadratic R^2=0.5881.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the remaining binary features, at least one has an adjusted effect on pfs_months whose magnitude exceeds 0.05 months and is statistically significant after Bonferroni correction across the binary feature set.

analyses.code: loop ols('pfs ~ <feat> + f078 + C(f057) + f051') for each remaining binary; Bonferroni α=0.05/k
analyses.result_summary: Tested 73 remaining binaries. Bonferroni α=6.85e-04. 0 survived. Top 5 by p: feature_086: b=-0.027 p=9.02e-03; feature_030: b=+0.030 p=1.44e-02; feature_089: b=+0.041 p=1.79e-02; feature_002: b=-0.019 p=4.49e-02; feature_040: b=-0.043 p=6.88e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope of pfs_months on feature_078 differs across feature_057 levels (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test ols(pfs ~ f078 + C(f057)) vs ols(pfs ~ f078*C(f057))

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months across feature_064 race categories differs by feature_057 level (interaction p < 0.05).

analyses.code: F-test C(f064):C(f057) interaction adjusted for f078

proposed_hypotheses.text: A consolidated multivariable model containing feature_078, C(feature_057), feature_051, feature_038, feature_013, feature_043, feature_109, feature_067, feature_099, feature_092 explains substantially more variance in pfs_months than feature_078 + C(feature_057) alone (Delta R^2 > 0.005).

analyses.code: ols simple vs final 10-feature model; nested F-test
